title: Applied AI Transformation Manager - Europe
must_haves: Technically oriented strategic advisor/operator embedding with strategic enterprise accounts
Deliver enterprise-wide agentic-AI transformation programs (operating model + delivery model)
Quantify value targets, program management & delivery across multiple strategic accounts
Trusted advisor to senior/functional leaders; value realization & reporting
hard_blockers: Enterprise transformation/program-delivery role for the largest enterprises — Ryan has no enterprise delivery/program-management/consulting background
'Technically oriented' for Devin (the AI software engineer) — strong SWE/dev-tooling adjacency Ryan lacks at production depth
Talent-dense team (ex-Scale/Palantir/Cursor/DeepMind, IOI medalists) implies elite-pedigree bar
met_strengths: Builds AI agents with Claude Code — genuine agentic fluency and credible AI-transformation narrative
one_line_verdict: An enterprise agentic-AI transformation/delivery role for a dev-tools (Devin) company gated on technical depth + enterprise program delivery + elite pedigree — beyond Ryan's operator/community profile.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via Ashby API (Cognition makes Devin/Windsurf). Role is enterprise transformation program delivery, 'technically oriented'. Europe/London. Glassdoor est. salary $55-97k (unverified).
